sections.paragraph:
Σεμεΐν (v.l. Σεμεΐ, Σεμεεί, Σεμείν), ὁ indecl. (שִׁמְעִי, freq. in the OT: Ex 6:17; Num 3:18; 2 Km 16:5; TestLevi 12:1 Σεμεῆ.—Joseph. has var. forms [s. index s.v. Σαμούις]) Semein, in the genealogy of Jesus Lk 3:26.

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

indecl. indecl. = indeclinable

freq. freq. = frequent(ly)

OT OT = Old Testament

TestLevi TestLevi = Testament of Levi, s. Test12Patr—List 2

Joseph Joseph This abbr. used when no specific texts are cited (s. Jos.); I a.d.—List 5

var. var. = various(ly)

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 919
